name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 17 Mar 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.94"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true},{"text":" "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the eBay integration that didn't update the weight of products correctly on eBay, when the product weight changed."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue when editing a sales order price in Safari where the price groups wouldn't display."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with editable kits in sales orders, where components couldn't be added to an orderline."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue when recording a payment on a sales order with direct deposit. The date picker will now let you enter a date prior to the current date, and save it correctly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
